name: company-ai-desktop
description: Electron shell for Enterprise AI Workspace

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/update-config.cjs && node --check src/updater.cjs && node --check scripts/write-update-proxy-config.mjs && node --check scripts/rewrite-release-feeds.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare:update-config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --publish never && npm run rewrite:feeds
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:update-config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable --publish never && npm run rewrite:feeds
